docket_entries.description: ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA (FORFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $569.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO MARIA FRANCISCA URIAS ESPINOZA ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT MARIA ISABEL URIAS ESPINOZA. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $569.50, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINTS ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
